msg.confirm: We think we recognised this product but we are not sure. Check the name and active ingredient shown, and confirm only if they match your bottle. Do not use it until you confirm.
msg.verified: This product is registered. See the correct dose, safety gear and waiting period below.
msg.unregistered: This registration number is not in the official registry. Do not use this product. Contact your extension agent or SMS the number to check.
msg.expired: This product's registration has expired. Do not use it. Contact your extension agent.
msg.suspended: This product has been suspended by regulators. Do not use it. Contact your extension agent.
msg.banned: This product is BANNED. Do not use it, do not buy it. It can seriously harm you, others and the environment.
msg.conservative: Could not confirm this product. Do not use until checked. Contact your extension agent or SMS the number.
msg.crop_not_covered: This crop is not covered for this product. Do not guess the dose — ask your extension agent.
msg.verified_as_of: Registered as of {date}. This was correct when last checked.
msg.stale: This was registered when last checked on {date}. Check again before use.
msg.sync_danger: A product you scanned{date} is NOT registered. Do not use it.

disclaimer.official: Official information. If unsure, contact your extension agent.

ui.no_connection: No connection. Try again when you are online.
ui.share_location: Share your location to help track fake products in your area?
ui.emergency_soon: Emergency first-aid guidance is coming soon. If someone is poisoned, get help now.
ui.lang_offer_spoken: This language is coming soon. Please choose Amharic or English.
ui.staging_notice: DEMONSTRATION ONLY — not a live safety service. Do not rely on it for real pesticide decisions.

hazard.U: Unlikely to be dangerous when used correctly

emergency.choose_route: How did the poison get in? Tap one.

aid.aid_move_air: Move the person to fresh air, away from the chemical.
aid.aid_remove_clothes: Remove any clothing that has the chemical on it.
aid.aid_rinse_skin: Rinse the skin with clean running water for twenty minutes.
aid.aid_rinse_eyes: Rinse the eyes with clean running water for twenty minutes. Keep the eye open.
aid.aid_do_not_vomit: Do not make the person vomit.
aid.aid_no_food_drink: Do not give food or drink.
aid.aid_keep_container: Keep the pesticide container to show the health worker.
aid.aid_seek_help: Take the person to a health centre immediately.
aid.aid_if_unconscious: If the person is not awake, lay them on their side and get help immediately.

sms.verified: Registered: {product}. Text CROP <name> for the dose.
sms.unregistered: NOT REGISTERED. May be fake. Do NOT use. Ask your agent.
sms.banned: BANNED. Do NOT use this product.
sms.expired: EXPIRED registration. Do NOT use until checked.
sms.suspended: SUSPENDED. Do NOT use until checked.
sms.unconfirmed: Could not confirm. Do NOT use until checked.
sms.help: Text a registration number for status. CROP <name> for dose. HELP for first aid. LANG am/om/ti/so/aa.
sms.lang_bad: Unknown language. Use: am om ti so aa en.
sms.crop_uncovered: Not approved for {crop}. Ask your extension agent.
sms.no_product: Text a registration number first, then CROP <name>.
sms.emergency_menu: FIRST AID. Reply: SKIN / EYES / SWALLOWED / BREATHED
sms.rate_limited: Too many messages. Please wait a while and try again.
sms.crop_unknown: Crop not recognized. Text CROP then the crop name.
sms.lang_unavailable: {lang} not available yet. Reply LANG AM for Amharic or LANG EN for English.

home.how_2: See at once if it is genuine, banned or unknown
home.how_3: Get the safe dose and first aid in your language
home.protect_3: Missing safety gear and waiting periods
home.protect_4: Poisoning — first aid is one tap away, even offline
home.real_2: Works by SMS on a basic phone
home.safe_body: MedaGuard never guesses. Doses, first aid and safety gear are looked up from a registry of registered pesticides with WHO hazard classes — the camera only reads the label. When it cannot be sure, it says so and points you to your extension agent instead of inventing an answer.
home.demo_note: A demonstration system. Not yet a live safety service.
home.skip: Open the scan screen when the app starts
home.skip_on: Opens on the scan screen — tap to show this page again
